review_notes: All four cardinals passed strict blind gates.
Intermediate blind mismatches and ambiguities are retained as warnings and resolved by labeled normal-size loop review.
No labeled wrong-quadrant pose, reversal, identity change, scale pop, registration jump, or tail detachment was observed.
